title: Introduction
body: Welcome to Zyplo documentation.
Learn how to set up your workspace, manage projects, and track tasks efficiently.

title: Getting Started
body: Create an account and log in.
Create your first workspace.
Create a project inside the workspace.
Invite your teammates.
Create and assign your first task.

title: Core Concepts
body: Workspace: Your team’s main space.
Project: A product or codebase inside a workspace.
Task: A unit of work with status, priority, assignee, and due date.
Status: To Do → In Progress → Review → Done.

title: Using the Kanban Board
body: Drag and drop tasks between columns to update status.
Filter by assignee, label, or priority.
Sort by due date or priority.

title: Command Palette
body: Press Ctrl + K to open the command palette.
Jump to projects, create tasks, assign issues, change status or priority.

title: Teams & Roles
body: Admin: Manage projects and members.
Member: Create, edit, and move tasks.

title: Notifications & Activity
body: Get notified when a task is assigned, status changes, or someone comments.
Activity log shows who did what and when.

title: Shortcuts & Tips
body: Ctrl + K — Open command palette.
Use labels to group tasks.
Use priorities to plan sprints.
Check the dashboard daily.
